### DomainEventHandler()

`DomainEventHandler` is a component without a user interface, utilized for managing event dispatching.

```typescript
DomainEventHandler: <C extends typeof DomainEvent<any>, E extends InstanceType<C>>({ type, handler, }: {
    type: C;
    handler: DomainEventCallback<E>;
}) => React.JSX.Element
```

#### DomainEventHandler的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  { type, handler, } | { type: C; handler: [DomainEventCallback](#domaineventcallback) &lt;E&gt;; } |  |

<b>返回值:</b>

React.JSX.Element
